nodes.name: bug_report.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template for bug reports, prompting reporters to provide environment, RisingWave version, steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behavior, and log attachments.

nodes.name: config.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template chooser configuration that defines contact links (community Slack, user surveys) alongside the standard issue templates.

nodes.name: design-rfc.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template for design RFCs (Request for Comments), guiding contributors through documenting motivation, design decisions, and rationale for major changes.

nodes.name: development-task.md
nodes.summary: Markdown issue template for internal development tasks, providing a minimal structure for tracking engineering work items.

nodes.name: feature_request.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template for feature requests, collecting description of the desired feature and the problem it solves.

nodes.name: flaky_test.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub issue template for reporting flaky tests, capturing test name, failure frequency, logs, and steps to reproduce.
